basic_details.job_title: NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram) has published the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 at nitmz.ac.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow position on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a first class in UG and PG, a Ph.D. degree from a reputed institute, and at least two research papers published in SCI/ SCIE/ SSCI journals are eligible to apply via email on or before 27 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and email application details below.

qualification.education_qualification: First class in UG and PG, Ph.D Degree from an Institute of Repute, At least 2 research papers in SCI/ SCIE/ SSCI journals
qualification.details: First class in Undergraduate (UG) and Postgraduate (PG) degrees. Ph.D. Degree from an Institute of Repute. At least 2 research papers published in SCI/SCIE/SSCI journals.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Mizoram Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Mizoram Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of CV

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow position at NIT Mizoram?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a first-class degree in both their undergraduate and postgraduate studies, along with a Ph.D. from a reputable institute. Additionally, at least two research papers in SCI/SCIE/SSCI journals are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 65,000 to Rs. 67,000 per month, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the NIT Mizoram recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NIT Mizoram recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500, while SC/ST candidates have to pay Rs. 200. Women candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a presentation followed by an interview, and document verification. Candidates are advised to be prepared for these stages.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIT Mizoram offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q9. What are the specific disciplines for which the Institute Post-Doctoral Fellow positions are advertised?
faq.answer: The positions are advertised for Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Basic Science and Humanities Social Science (Mathematics).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application links will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please refer to that section for direct access.
